content: {"name": "Verdant Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.\nCreatures you control with power 2 or less get +1/+1.\n{2}{G}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for a basic Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "The forest remembers every seed, every sprout, every mighty oak that once was small.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "This enchantment embodies green's themes of growth, creature support, and ramp. The three abilities work together: the ETB creates a small creature that benefits from the static buff, while the sacrifice ability provides late-game utility and mana fixing. The power 2 restriction prevents this from being oppressive with larger creatures while encouraging a go-wide strategy. The mana cost and rarity are appropriate for an enchantment with multiple utility effects. Green's color pie is respected through creature tokens, +1/+1 effects, and land ramp."}
